summary: Iteration 4 comprehensive testing: 10/10 backend pytest tests pass (100%). Backend verified: /api/restaurants returns 18 items with all 7 new IDs (dona-barca, sushi-portimao, gelataria-portimao, padaria-tentacao, pizza-brasil, praia-esplanada, vegan-portimao); /api/beaches returns 10 beaches with image_url/kids_score/family_tip/hazards/lat/lng; /api/attractions returns 12 attractions with all expected IDs; /api/tickets ida ticket has 4 passengers (Alex/Priscila/Alexsandro/Arthur) with seats [50,51,52,53] class Inteiro, hotel ticket has 9 amenities + 5 nearby POIs; /api/hotel-details returns Studio 17 with score 7.9, size_m2 50, 9 amenities, 5 nearby, 4 reminders; /api/ai-tip returns tip+topic+icon and is cached (2 identical calls confirm). Frontend verified on mobile viewport (390x844): Home shows AI Tip card with GEMINI badge + Portuguese tip, hero image loads. /beaches shows all 4 filter chips (Todas/Ideais crianças/Perto do hotel/Icónicas), KIDS badge, family tip box, amenities row, Bora lá + Maps buttons. /activities shows all 5 filters (Todas/Kids/Aventura/Cultura/Grátis) and 12 cards with Zoomarine/Slide/Sagres/Silves, Abrir no mapa + Reservar buttons. /tickets shows all 4 passengers with seat badges 50-53, hotel amenities grid + nearby POIs (Estádio/Forte/Museu/Tentação/Igreja). /explorar hub includes Praias + Atividades cards. Deprecation warnings detected (non-blocking): shadow* style props and props.pointerEvents.

issues: Second beach card image sometimes lazy-loads slowly (blank green area briefly). Non-blocking, first-card render is instant.

react_native_issues.issue: Console shows repeated deprecation: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use "boxShadow".' Not blocking but should migrate for RN 0.76+/web compatibility.
Console shows 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents.' Non-blocking, migrate to style-based pointerEvents.

action_items: (Optional) Migrate shadow* props to boxShadow in StyleSheet.create() calls to remove RN web deprecation warnings.
(Optional) Move pointerEvents from props to style.pointerEvents.
Consider adding testID props to beaches/activities/tickets cards for more robust future automation (tests currently rely on innerText scan).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is 1772 lines — recommend splitting static data (RESTAURANTS/BEACHES/ATTRACTIONS/TICKETS) into a separate data/ module for maintainability.
/api/ai-tip fallback (no EMERGENT_LLM_KEY) omits 'icon' field; consider always including icon for consistent frontend rendering.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing seeded checklist/shopping and static endpoints. ai_tips MongoDB collection is auto-populated via /api/ai-tip cache.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 4 endpoints are green. Frontend onboarding must be dismissed via clicking 'Saltar' button before deep-linking to /beaches, /activities, /tickets, /explorar — localStorage flags do not skip onboarding in web preview. EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL = https://portimao-experiences.preview.emergentagent.com.
